Operation 'getRoomInfo' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. The current description is too generic and lacks essential details. It doesn't specify what inputs are required (RoomInfoRequest structure), what outputs are returned, authentication requirements, or use cases. The improved description clarifies the request/response schemas, authentication needs, and provides context for when an AI agent should use this operation.

data.current_description: Get room information from the PMS interface.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves room information from the PMS system via the connectivity interface. Accepts a RoomInfoRequest containing hotel and room identifiers. Returns room details including type, availability, rates, and amenities. Requires valid API authentication. Use this operation to fetch current room data for display in booking engines or property management dashboards.
data.reasoning: The current description is too generic and lacks essential details. It doesn't specify what inputs are required (RoomInfoRequest structure), what outputs are returned, authentication requirements, or use cases. The improved description clarifies the request/response schemas, authentication needs, and provides context for when an AI agent should use this operation.

message: Operation 'kioskConnectivity' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. The current summary is too generic and doesn't indicate the specific action. The description lists operations but doesn't clarify how to invoke them, what the request structure contains, what outputs are returned, or when an AI agent should use this operation. The improved version specifies the request/response relationship, authentication requirements, operation flexibility, and practical use cases for better AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Perform various kiosk operations including currency retrieval, pay methods, identity types, and room availability.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve kiosk configuration and availability data
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves kiosk-related configuration data and room availability information. Accepts a KioskRequest specifying the operation type and hotel context. Returns operation-specific data including supported currencies, payment methods, identity types, and current room availability status. Supports multiple operation types determined by request parameters. Requires valid API authentication. Use this operation to populate kiosk displays with current property configuration and booking availability.
data.reasoning: The current summary is too generic and doesn't indicate the specific action. The description lists operations but doesn't clarify how to invoke them, what the request structure contains, what outputs are returned, or when an AI agent should use this operation. The improved version specifies the request/response relationship, authentication requirements, operation flexibility, and practical use cases for better AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'getHotelList' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description lacks clarity on filtering options and return value details. Added information about authentication requirement, what hotel details are returned, and guidance on when to use group vs. hotel code filtering for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Get a list of hotels by group code or hotel code.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve hotels by group or property code
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of hotels filtered by group code or individual hotel code. Requires API authentication. Returns hotel details including property information, contact details, and configuration. Use group code to retrieve all properties in a group, or hotel code for a specific property.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks clarity on filtering options and return value details. Added information about authentication requirement, what hotel details are returned, and guidance on when to use group vs. hotel code filtering for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'getHotelAmenities' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description is too minimal. Added required input parameters (hotel code), authentication context, details about what amenity information is returned, and use cases to help AI agents understand when and how to invoke this operation.

data.current_description: Get amenities for a specific hotel.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve amenities for a specific hotel property
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the list of amenities available at a specific hotel property. Requires hotel code as input and API authentication. Returns amenity details including amenity names, descriptions, and availability status. Use this to display property features and facilities to guests or for booking engine integration.
data.reasoning: Original description is too minimal. Added required input parameters (hotel code), authentication context, details about what amenity information is returned, and use cases to help AI agents understand when and how to invoke this operation.

Original description is vague about what 'configured details' includes and lacks context about use cases. data.current_description: Get configured details including salutations and countries.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves configured lookup data required for booking forms and guest information collection. Returns salutation options (Mr., Ms., Dr., etc.), country list with codes, and other reference data. Requires API authentication. Use this to populate dropdown fields in booking engines and reservation systems.
data.reasoning: Original description is vague about what 'configured details' includes and lacks context about use cases. Improved summary and description clarify the lookup data purpose, specific data returned, authentication requirement, and practical application for booking form population.

message: Operation 'calculateExtraCharge' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks clarity on required inputs and return structure. Enhanced description specifies what inputs are needed (dates, room details, charge config), what charges are calculated (taxes, fees, surcharges), detailed return information, and clarifies this is a read-only calculation operation.

data.current_description: Calculate extra charges for a booking based on dates and charge details.
data.summary_suggestion: Calculate additional charges for booking dates
data.description_suggestion: Calculates additional charges (taxes, fees, surcharges) applicable to a booking for specified dates and room type. Requires booking dates, room details, and charge configuration parameters. Returns calculated charge breakdown including individual charge items, totals, and applicable tax information. Does not modify booking state - returns calculation only.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks clarity on required inputs and return structure. Enhanced description specifies what inputs are needed (dates, room details, charge config), what charges are calculated (taxes, fees, surcharges), detailed return information, and clarifies this is a read-only calculation operation.
